blended.narrative: Hudson Bay Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,492 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
